first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (3/10) and provide the same core reasoning for it: the candidate is a strong senior engineer but lacks the 15+ years of experience and the specific AI/strategic track record required for a Principal/Director-level role. The minor differences in wording and the slightly different grouping of strengths and concerns fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the underlying assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
